name: neura-openclaw-os-decision-receipt-surface
description: Safe local projection of Decision Receipts beside persistent autonomous workspace actions before anything changes state.
relay_path: persistent workspace action -> Action Card -> Authority Decision Engine posture -> Decision Receipt -> developer-owned execution

actions.title: Generated App Deploy
actions.workspace_context: An autonomous workspace generated a customer portal and wants to publish it from a preview branch.
actions.action_summary: Deploy generated customer portal from preview to production
actions.authority_engine_posture: Release authority, security review, rollback evidence, and Registry-backed production standing are missing.
actions.readiness_path: Keep the generated app in preview, attach release authority and review refs, then request a new receipt.
actions.developer_owned_next_step: Do not deploy. Route the preview and receipt to the release owner.

actions.title: Artifact Publish
actions.workspace_context: An agent produced a research bundle and wants to publish it to an external stakeholder folder.
actions.action_summary: Publish analysis bundle to external shared folder
actions.authority_engine_posture: External artifact publication is allowed only after redaction and audience approval refs are present.
actions.readiness_path: Attach redaction and audience approval refs or convert the artifact to an internal-only draft.
actions.developer_owned_next_step: Hold publication until the human owner reviews the refs-only receipt.

actions.title: Scheduled Cron Action
actions.workspace_context: A workspace monitor wants to create a recurring production reconciliation job.
actions.authority_engine_posture: Scheduling authority exists, but the job needs an owner, runbook, and rollback refs before recurrence.
actions.readiness_path: Revise the Action Card with runbook, owner, rollback, and bounded schedule refs.
actions.developer_owned_next_step: Revise the schedule request before creating the cron in the workspace runtime.

actions.title: Workflow Monitor Intervention
actions.workspace_context: A monitor detects a stuck case and proposes moving it into human-review status.
actions.action_summary: Move stuck case from auto-processing to human review
actions.authority_engine_posture: The transition is reversible, scoped to review routing, and supported by stuck-case evidence refs.
actions.readiness_path: No additional refs required for the review transition.
actions.developer_owned_next_step: Workspace runtime may move the case to human review; Neura does not move it.

actions.title: Session Memory Write
actions.workspace_context: An agent wants to persist a durable memory from a temporary planning session.
actions.action_summary: Persist durable workspace memory from session note
actions.authority_engine_posture: Durable memory is allowed only when the user confirmation and retention-scope refs are explicit.
actions.readiness_path: Revise the memory to a refs-only summary and attach explicit user-confirmation and retention refs.
actions.developer_owned_next_step: Keep the memory ephemeral until the runtime has user confirmation.

actions.title: Browser Direct Control
actions.workspace_context: A browser-control agent has filled a vendor form and is about to submit the final action.
actions.authority_engine_posture: The destination is external and the workspace lacks a destination approval ref and account-owner authority.
actions.readiness_path: Cancel the submit path and request explicit account-owner and destination approval refs.
actions.developer_owned_next_step: Do not submit. Escalate the receipt to the operator before browser execution.

actions.title: Shell And File Operation
actions.workspace_context: A coding agent wants to run a local cleanup script that deletes generated files and updates workspace state.
actions.action_summary: Apply generated cleanup plan to workspace files
actions.authority_engine_posture: Sandbox authority is present, but delete/update operations need a diff preview and restore refs.
actions.readiness_path: Attach diff preview and restore refs, then rerun the receipt before file changes.
actions.developer_owned_next_step: Hold the cleanup operation until a human reviews the generated diff refs.
